headline: Barclays and FIS Extend Partnership Supporting Bank's Online Deposits Growth
summary: WILMINGTON, Del. & JACKSONVILLE, Fla., April 14, 2026--Barclays US Consumer Bank, a leading digital banking partner, and FIS® (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial technology, today announced a multi-year extension of their core banking partnership agreement, supporting the bank's retail deposits growth ambitions and continued focus on modernizing its digital platforms and capabilities.
